ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded metrics */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the recorded metrics */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the recorded metrics */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was collected (e.g., '08:00') */,
  "rainfall" INTEGER /* Total rainfall in millimeters */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Average wind speed in km/h */,
  "max_temp" INTEGER /* Maximum recorded temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temp" INTEGER /* Minimum recorded temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "air_pressure" INTEGER /* Average air pressure in hPa */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., 'rain', 'snow', 'sleet') */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., 'active', 'maintenance', 'decommissioned') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'analyst', 'researcher', 'admin') */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., 'success', 'failure') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("id")
)
